tasks.description: Receive cacao beans for the 75 g focused factory scope.
successCriteria: On-hand exists in FACTORY_RM_STORE
Lot is linked
UOM remains kg or g

tasks.description: Roast and winnow cacao beans into Cacao Nibs - Raw Material.
expectedActions: Report production for Cacao Nibs - Raw Material
successCriteria: Cacao nib inventory increases
Bean inventory decreases
Work order posts cleanly

tasks.description: Produce Base - 70% Dark Chocolate from cacao nibs, sugar, and cacao butter.
successCriteria: Base stock is received to production location
All issue lines use mass UOMs

tasks.description: Produce Base - Milk Chocolate for the retained 75 g milk variants.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, butter, powdered milk
successCriteria: Base - Milk Chocolate on-hand increases
Inputs remain traceable

tasks.description: Produce Base - Coconut Milk Chocolate for dark coconut variants.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, butter, coconut milk powder
successCriteria: Coconut base is available for downstream bars

tasks.description: Produce Base - Pomelo for the Hill Coffee and Pomelo 75 g bar.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs, sugar, coffee beans
successCriteria: Base - Pomelo is created exactly once

tasks.description: Produce Base - Sugar Free for the Paleo Robbie 75 g bars.
expectedActions: Issue cacao nibs and powdered milk
successCriteria: No cane sugar is consumed
Sugar-free base is stocked by weight

tasks.description: Run Work Order 1 to create Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g) from base chocolate, inclusions, and foil.
itemsInvolved: Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g)
successCriteria: Wrapped output UOM is each
Wrapped bars remain in non-sellable production inventory

tasks.description: Inspect Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g) and confirm it cannot be treated as sellable finished stock.
itemsInvolved: Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g)
successCriteria: Wrapped bars are classified as production output
No workflow step suggests shipping the wrapped bar

tasks.description: Run Work Order 2 to box Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Boxed (75g) from Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g).
expectedActions: Issue wrapped bars and pack-out materials
itemsInvolved: Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Boxed (75g)
Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween - Wrapped (75g)
Wrapper - Apple Pie Milk Chocolate - Halloween (75g)
successCriteria: Boxed output is each-counted
Wrapping and sticker components are consumed at box-out

tasks.description: Transfer German Chocolate Cake 70% Dark Chocolate - Christmas - Boxed (75g) from FACTORY_FG_STAGE to FACTORY_SELLABLE for finished-goods handling.
expectedActions: Verify no wrapped stock is moved to sellable locations
itemsInvolved: German Chocolate Cake 70% Dark Chocolate - Christmas - Boxed (75g)
German Chocolate Cake 70% Dark Chocolate - Christmas - Wrapped (75g)
successCriteria: Only boxed bars reach sellable locations
Wrapped intermediates stay out of shipping flow

tasks.description: Verify each-count inventory and sellable status for Masala Chai Milk Chocolate - Boxed (75g).
successCriteria: Boxed finished item UOM is each only
Sellable workflow points only to boxed stock

tasks.description: Pick Simply Cacao Plus Milk - Paleo Robbie - Boxed (75g) for an outbound order.
itemsInvolved: Simply Cacao Plus Milk - Paleo Robbie - Boxed (75g)
successCriteria: Picked quantity is counted by each
No wrapped intermediate can be allocated for shipping

tasks.description: Pack and ship Tom Yum Dark Chocolate - Boxed (75g) to a customer.
successCriteria: Inventory decreases from SELLABLE
Shipment closes successfully without touching wrapped stock

tasks.description: Inspect minimal-stock shortage behavior after one full unit of every retained 75 g SKU is planned.
expectedActions: Plan one run per 75 g SKU
successCriteria: Every retained 75 g SKU is manufacturable exactly once
No unrelated leaf materials are stocked

tasks.description: Inspect base-stock normal production behavior across repeated 75 g runs.
expectedActions: Plan five runs per retained SKU
successCriteria: Raw materials support >= 5 runs
Packaging supports >= 7 aggregated runs

tasks.description: Verify only boxed 75 g bars remain as finished goods in the focused BOM.
successCriteria: No 8 g, 20 g, 1 kg, powder, nib pack, gift box, or sauce outputs remain as finished goods
Wrapped bars appear only as intermediates
